subject: Michigan Court Dismisses Charges Against 15 Republicans in Presidential Certification Case
body_content:
Post       : Michigan Court Dismisses Charges Against 15 Republicans in Presidential Certification Case
URL        : https://jonathanturley.org/2025/09/09/michigan-court-dismisses-charges-against-15-republicans-in-presidential-certification-case/
Posted     : September 9, 2025 at 9:41 PM
Author     : jonathanturley
Categories : Criminal law, Politics

https://jonathanturley.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/AG_Dana_Nessel_thumbnail_642203_7.jpg District Court Judge Kristen D. Simmons has dismissed the criminal charges against 15 Republicans charged with falsely attempting to certify President Donald Trump as the winner of the 2020 election. It is a major loss for Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel (D) (shown left), who garnered public support in trying to prosecute the Michigan electors.

Add a comment to this post: https://jonathanturley.org/2025/09/09/michigan-court-dismisses-charges-against-15-republicans-in-presidential-certification-case/#respond
